entry.title: New GWAC GS00Q09BGD0047 awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY for the amount of $2,500

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE SCOPE OF THE ALLIANT GWAC INCLUDES ANY AND ALL COMPONENTS OF AN INTEGRATED INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (IT) SOLUTION, INCLUDING ALL CURRENT AND ANY NEW TECHNOLOGIES WHICH MAY EMERGE DURING THE LIFE CYCLE OF THE CONTRACT AND IT SYSTEMS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: SECTION 5112(E) OF THE CLINGER-COHEN ACT, 40 U.S.C. 1412

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
